I1.name: Core Web Vitals (LIVE: CLS strict, LCP local-aware)

B5.name: No raw internals in user copy

T7.name: Clean JS thread (no console noise on load)

X1.name: Task-flow coherence (every empty/no-results state offers a next step)

Y2.name: Stress-case resilience (no time-pressure on consequential actions)

AI4.name: AI graceful failure (honest error + retry, no fabrication)

PP1.name: Working indicator on async ops (>1s feedback)

DD1.name: At-a-glance primary KPI (biggest number, seen first)

DP1.name: No fake urgency or scarcity (manufactured pressure)

DP2.name: No confirmshaming on the decline path
